resources.string: Local notifications for completed turns and requests that need attention.
Turn failed. Open Remodex for details.
Tap the trophy for beta missions, feedback, and the leaderboard.
Open the menu to pick a thread, or start a chat on the desktop.
Hi, How can I help you?
This message contains one unified diff and this file cannot be extracted by itself, so the full patch is shown.
You can attach up to %1$d items per message.
Only %1$d attachments are allowed per message.
One or more attachments could not be loaded.
Camera is not available on this device.
Camera permission is required to take a photo.
Microphone permission is required for voice input.
Could not start the microphone. Try again.
No audio was captured. Try again.
%1$d draft(s) queued while current turn runs.
Restore is available only when composer is empty and idle.
Create a fork of this conversation and switch to it.
Moves tracked local changes, then keeps this chat in the target checkout.
Could not determine a base branch for the managed worktree.
Could not find a local checkout path for this worktree.
Move tracked local changes, then keep this chat in the managed worktree checkout.
Move tracked worktree changes back to the local checkout, then keep this chat there.
No base branch is available for creating the managed worktree.
Refresh context window and account rate limits
No account limit rows yet. Tap refresh.
Context window and account limits for this chat (from the bridge only).
No assistant change sets recorded for this thread yet.
Revert action is not wired on Android yet (foundation only).
Revert needs a local working directory for this thread.
Revert becomes available after response finalization.
Inverse patch metadata is missing for this response.
This response is marked as not auto-revertable.
This response failed while collecting change-set data.
Show detailed usage and rate limits
Refresh context window and account rate limits
Could not open Codex on your desktop.
Use plan is available only when composer is empty.
No local project to branch from. Open a project chat, then try again.
Could not determine a base branch. Check Git status in the open chat, then try again.
Create a new agent session in a few steps.
Choose where this thread should start.
Choose where to run this thread.
Run on this computer with access to local files.
Start a local Codex chat without choosing a project folder.
Remove "%1$s" from this phone. The paired desktop runtime is not changed.
All active chats in this project will be archived.
All chats in this project will be removed from this phone. The paired desktop runtime is not changed.
Computer LAN IP or emulator host
Daily beta missions, feedback, and anonymous contribution score.
Local alerts only. Remodex uses them for completed runs and other attention-needed events while the app is backgrounded.
Background run-completion alerts can post while the app is not in the foreground.
Android is currently blocking local alerts for this app.
Data comes from the bridge; nothing is sent to a hosted dashboard.
Connect to the bridge to load account limits.
No limit data yet. Tap refresh after the bridge is connected.
For the chat you have open. Data comes from the bridge only.
Open a chat to load context window usage here.
Prose font (conversation UI will respect this in a later phase).
Choose the color used for your messages in the timeline.
Choose the app language. By default Remodex follows your device language.
Use the device setting or lock Remodex to light or dark.
Trusted Mac and runtime defaults will land as Android service parity grows.
Loading local Codex pets from your device…
No local Codex pets found in ~/.codex/pets.
After redeeming, return here and reconnect once billing verification is configured.
This stops in-progress runs and reloads chats for the other device.
The paired device will be removed from this phone. Scan its QR code again to reconnect.
What would you like to work on?
Quick Chat starts without a project folder until you send.
Use this on the Windows PC you want Remodex to open terminals on.
Open PowerShell as Administrator. This installs the Windows SSH server, starts it now, and starts it automatically after reboot.
Still in Administrator PowerShell, allow inbound SSH on port 22 so your phone can reach this PC.
New-NetFirewallRule ` -Name sshd ` -DisplayName "OpenSSH Server sshd" ` -Enabled True ` -Direction Inbound ` -Protocol TCP ` -Action Allow ` -LocalPort 22;
Create a dedicated SSH key for Remodex. The public key stays on Windows; the private key is pasted into Remodex.
Use the non-admin command for a normal Windows account. Use the admin block only if you will log in with an administrator account.
Find your Windows username, your PC IPv4 address, and the private key text. Paste the private key into Remodex, not the .pub file.

Recommended private-key format: OpenSSH Ed25519 with a passphrase, created by ssh-keygen above. Remodex also accepts encrypted PKCS#8 and encrypted legacy PEM keys; unencrypted keys work only if you explicitly enable that option on the profile. Copy the private key into Remodex, not the .pub file.
Copy this prompt into a Codex chat. It can walk you through the setup step by step.

I am setting up Remodex on my phone so I can open a terminal on my Windows PC over SSH. Walk me through the Windows setup step by step. Ask me whether my Windows account is admin or non-admin and help me run the PowerShell commands safely. Remodex SSH profile fields: Host = Windows PC IPv4 address from ipconfig; Port = 22; Username = Windows username from whoami, using only the part after \\; Private key = full contents of $HOME\\.ssh\\remodex_ed25519, not the .pub file; Passphrase = the key passphrase, or empty if no passphrase was used.
Android companion for the local Remodex bridge.
Remodex keeps Android paired to your local bridge. Chat content and status stay inside your setup.
Use the QR flow to connect to the bridge on your computer.

- Added Tailscale support for easier local-first connectivity outside the LAN. - Added the first Android terminal add-on flow with native SSH support, saved profiles, trusted hosts, multiple sessions, setup help, input handling, and terminal UI wiring. - Upgraded remodex-host to 0.3.0. - Added a host diagnostics panel. - Added a new animated pet asset set with improved customization/setup assets.

- Improved setup customization and bundled host configuration. - Improved Windows bridge compatibility, including command resolution, image preview generation, and cross-platform IPC tests. - Improved plan UI presentation and interaction behavior. - Strengthened Android and host-side security validation/runtime checks.

- Fixed Windows bridge gaps caused by Unix-only assumptions. - Fixed newly created chats sometimes not appearing immediately in the mobile thread list. - Fixed mojibake in Android user-facing strings. - Fixed branch selector pill border inconsistency.
Everything runs on your Mac.\nYour phone is the remote.
Commit, push, pull, and switch branches
The relay never sees your prompts or code
Spawn and monitor parallel agents from your phone
The AI coding agent that lives in your terminal. Remodex connects to it from your phone.
A lightweight relay that securely connects your Mac to your phone.
Run this on your Mac. A QR code will appear in your terminal — scan it next.
Camera permission is required to scan the pairing QR.
QR OK — adjust relay override if needed, then tap Connect.
Codex is requesting permission to continue.
Codex is waiting for your input.
Git branch info needs a local project path on this thread.
Connect to the bridge to load Git branch info.
Git branch %1$s, default %2$s, %3$d branches checked out in other worktrees
Use a valid Git branch name.
A branch with this name already exists.
Branch switching is unavailable while this chat is running.
Cannot switch branches: this branch is already open in another worktree.
Starts a native code review for uncommitted local changes.
Starts a native code review comparing this branch with the selected base.
No branches are available for base review.
Code review cannot be queued while this chat is running.
Code review requires an empty composer.
No default branch is available for this thread.
No base branch is available for this review.
Code review does not support composer attachments.
Update Remodex on your computer to use Speed controls
This computer bridge does not support the selected speed setting yet. Update the Remodex npm package to use Fast Mode and other speed controls.
No file-change patch was captured for the last assistant turn.
Synced history sometimes only stores a preview (not full diff text). Open Full working tree for the git patch from your Mac.
This folder is not initialized yet. Initialize it locally so Git actions work here.
GitHub CLI is not ready on your Mac. Opened a PR draft in the browser instead.
